fields.description:
## Description

**What**: Replace all plugins/dso/... path strings in .md files within plugins/dso/agents/, plugins/dso/skills/, and plugins/dso/docs/ with portable alternatives. Runtime paths (in code blocks, tool invocations) use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/. Prose references use plugin-root-relative form (e.g., agents/foo.md). No exceptions — all plugins/dso references must be removed.
**Why**: Agent and skill markdown files contain inline instructions that agents execute. When those instructions reference plugin files by install path, they fail in host projects.
**Scope**:
- IN: All plugins/dso/... references in .md files under plugins/dso/ — runtime paths, prose references, code blocks, tool invocations, grep/git commands in documentation
- OUT: .sh script files (S2); .py/.conf/.json files (S2)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, grep -r plugins/dso plugins/dso/ --include=*.md returns zero matches — no annotation bypass, no exceptions
- When this story is complete, runtime paths in code blocks and tool invocations use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/
- When this story is complete, human-readable prose uses plugin-root-relative paths (e.g., agents/foo.md)
- When this story is complete, migration tooling is created at repo root (scripts/) and deleted after use

## Considerations

- [Scope boundary] Distinguish runtime paths (convert to ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/), human prose (strip to relative form) — but NO category stays as-is
- [Ordering] Migration tooling must be deleted before enforcement hook (S4) activates
